channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Daily Minute — May 25, 2026
item.description: For hell and oblivion are ideas which YOU made up, and you are bent on demonstrating their reality to establish YOURS. If THEIR reality is questioned, you believe that YOURS is. For you believe that ATTACK is your reality, and that your destruction is the final proof that you were RIGHT. Under the circumstances, would it not be more DESIRABLE to have been wrong, even apart from the fact that you W

item.title: Lesson 38: “There is nothing my holiness cannot do.”
item.description: “There is nothing my holiness cannot do.” Your holiness reverses all the laws of the world. It is beyond every restriction of time, space, distance and limits of any kind. Your holiness is totally unlimited in its power because it establishes you as a Son of God, at one with the Mind of his Creator. Through your holiness the power of God is made manifest.Through your holiness the power of God is m
